## Validation

- [ ] `cargo test`

## Security checklist

- [ ] No tokens, API keys, cookies, tunnel URLs, logs, or local `~/.opensub`
      files were committed.
- [ ] Logs do not expose request bodies, response bodies, bearer tokens, API
      keys, or tool payloads.
- [ ] API-key auth and upstream token allowlisting remain intact, or the change
      explains why they changed.
